name: Sprouted Grain Spicy Seitan Sandwich
intro: This super simple sandwich stars tender patties from an Instant Pot or pressure cooker. Premake the seitan and keep in the fridge or freezer for a super fast lunch.

ingredients.item: sprouted grain English muffins, sliced open
Condiments of your choice, such as dairy-free chipotle mayo and horseradish mustard

method: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and fry the patties until just golden on each side.
While the patties are in the skillet, toast the English muffins. Layer the toast with mayo, mustard, avocado, patty, and onion.
